title: Tooltec
description: tooltec.se zoominfo.com/c/tooltec-ab/371817746 advanced manufacturing company based in Trollhättan, Sweden, specializing in the precision machining of complex components. The company utilizes technologies like 5-axis milling, turning, and Wire EDM to produce high-quality parts for the automotive, energy, aeronautical, and aerospace industries. As an ISO 9001 certified supplier, Tooltec is recognized for its strict quality standards, delivery reliability, and commitment to long-term partnerships with both clients and employees
